Career Timeline

Work Experience

Founder’s Office Intern
Oct 2025 – Jan 2026
Kulp Labs Pvt. Ltd  ·  AI SaaS
  • Spearheaded GTM strategy for an AI SaaS product — designed hero funnel, implemented PLG model, optimised pricing, resulting in 2,000+ users on the waitlist before launch.
  • Built affiliate marketing performance dashboard in Google Sheets, saving ~10 hours weekly for the marketing team.
  • Streamlined operations via Zapier automation — boosted team efficiency by 20%.
  • Developed India’s first AI-automated blog writing application, accelerating content creation by 70%.
  • Led LinkedIn growth initiatives — 37.5% follower growth and 5,000+ SEO-optimised web pages via programmatic SEO.
Marketing Intern
Jun 2025 – Sept 2025
Prince Group, Mumbai  ·  Real Estate
  • Managed real estate marketing across Mumbai’s residential and commercial properties.
  • Ran Meta and LinkedIn ad campaigns for property renting and outright sales.
  • Contacted 900+ residential and 1,200+ commercial brokers for listing acquisition.
  • Closed a 6-figure deal single-handedly alongside the Managing Director.
Sales Intern
Jul 2024 – Sept 2024
Websites.co.in, Mumbai  ·  Web Development
  • Represented company at Global Economic Summit at World Trade Center, Cuffe Parade alongside CEO Kartik Raichura.
  • Managed CRM software and scheduled meetings with international clients.
  • Averaged 5 client interactions daily and generated consistent 5-figure sales.
E-Commerce Manager
Apr 2022 – Sept 2022
Asenne, Mumbai  ·  Fashion E-Commerce
  • Managed all Shopify e-commerce operations — processed 70+ orders daily.
  • Contributed to growing brand to 32k Instagram followers through creative content.
  • Handled inventory, logistics, and delivery optimisation via Shiprocket.
